title: API Key Management

apiKeyEditPlaceholder: Leave empty to keep current key
deleteConfirm: Delete API key (****...{{last4}}) for {{provider}}? This action cannot be undone.

smtp.subtitle: Configure the mail server for sending emails
smtp.noSettingsDesc: Configure SMTP settings to enable email functionality.

paymentGateway.subtitle: Configure payment gateway for AI quota purchases
paymentGateway.keyHint: Leave empty to keep current key
paymentGateway.saveError: Failed to save payment gateway settings.
paymentGateway.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this payment gateway configuration?
paymentGateway.deleteError: Failed to delete payment gateway configuration.

result.successDesc: Your payment has been processed successfully.
result.failedDesc: Your payment could not be completed.

permissions.title: Access Permissions
permissions.subtitle: Manage menu access, visibility, and display order.
permissions.headerTitle: Access Permissions > Menu Setup and Permission Control
permissions.headerSubtitle: Manage menu guides, menu setup, and role permissions in one place.
permissions.adminGroupNote: Admin Level (SUPER_ADMIN, ADMIN) always has access to all menus and cannot be modified.
permissions.cellColumnTooltip: Use checkboxes to restrict menu access by cell. Only checked cells can access the menu. If no cell is checked, all users are allowed.

menuGuide.title: Menu Guide
menuGuide.description: Create and manage operational guides and tips for each menu.

menuConfig.title: Menu Configuration
menuConfig.description: Manage menu visibility and display order.
menuConfig.disabledNote: Disabled menus are hidden from all users.
menuConfig.dragHint: Drag the handle to reorder menus.
menuConfig.disabledHint: Disabled (OFF) menus are grayed out and hidden from the sidebar.
menuConfig.protectWarning: Disabling the Permissions menu will prevent managing settings.

rolePermissions.title: Role Permissions
rolePermissions.description: Set menu access permissions by role. Admin level is locked.
rolePermissions.adminNote: Admin Level always has access to all menus.
rolePermissions.disabledMenuNote: Disabled menus (from Menu Config) are not shown here.

userPermissions.title: User Permissions
userPermissions.description: Override role-based access for specific users.
userPermissions.noPermissionsDesc: Add individual permissions to override role defaults.
userPermissions.deleteConfirm: Remove this permission? The user will revert to role defaults.
userPermissions.overrideNote: This setting overrides the role-based access.

drive.title: Google Drive Settings
drive.subtitle: Configure Google Drive connection for document management
drive.impersonateEmailHint: The Google Workspace email to impersonate via domain-wide delegation
drive.sharedFolderHint: Select the shared drive or folder to use as the company document root
drive.saveFailed: Failed to save Google Drive settings.
drive.statusNotConfigured: Google Drive service is not configured. Check service account key.
drive.myDriveHint: Personal drive of the impersonated email user

setupGuide.title: Service Account Setup Guide
setupGuide.description: A Google Cloud Service Account is required for Google Drive integration. Follow the steps below.
setupGuide.step1Desc: Create a project in Google Cloud Console and enable the Google Drive API.
setupGuide.step2Desc: Go to IAM & Admin → Service Accounts, create a service account, and download the JSON key.
setupGuide.step3Desc: In Google Workspace Admin Console → Security → API Controls → Domain-wide Delegation, add the service account client ID and set the scopes.
setupGuide.step4Desc: Set the downloaded JSON key content in the server environment variable GOOGLE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_KEY_JSON.

conversations.title: AMA AI Consultation Management
conversations.subtitle: Monitor entity conversations, join rooms, and convert them into issues or notes

selection.title: Selected Content
selection.fullConversation: If no message is selected, the whole conversation will be used.

emailBranding.title: Invitation Email Branding
emailBranding.displayNameHint: Name shown in invitation emails. Defaults to entity name if empty.
emailBranding.logoUrlHint: HTTPS image URL for the email header logo (recommended: max 300×80px).

site.indexPageDesc: Configure the HTML page displayed as the landing page for site visitors
